inputs.text: Mujhe bhukh nahi lag rahi, thoda bukhar hai, sir dard hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever, malaise, headache are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can also present with similar symptoms

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, typhoid is less likely at this stage without more specific symptoms

inputs.text: Bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard ho raha hai, kabz bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever and abdominal pain are suggestive of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can also cause abdominal pain and constipation

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is less likely given the new symptoms

inputs.text: Tez bukhar hai, kabz ke baad dast ho raha hai, mujhe bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai
inputs.image_desc: pale appearance, dark circles under eyes

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Diarrhea after constipation and severe weakness are cardinal signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can cause diarrhea but the overall clinical picture suggests typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria is less likely without specific symptoms like chills and rigors

inputs.text: Mujhe bahut thakaan mehsoos ho rahi hai, bukhar abhi tak hai, pet mein bahut dard hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The patient's symptoms have progressed to a point where typhoid is the most likely diagnosis

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the progression of symptoms and presence of blood-tinged sputum

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the lack of specific symptoms and the progression of the disease
